2026-04-07T19:30:19.2440245Z   
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2442302Z   1. **What changed**: PR #57860 fixed a bug in `RecordedTestAttribute.cs` where `GlobalDisableAutoRecording` was not being checked before attempting to auto-record a failing test. The fix adds a check for `TestEnvironment.GlobalDisableAutoRecording` (controlled by the `CLIENTMODEL_DISABLE_AUTO_RECORDING` env var).
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2444598Z   
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2445013Z   2. **Documentation gaps**:
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2446197Z      - The README doesn't mention `GlobalDisableAutoRecording` or the `CLIENTMODEL_DISABLE_AUTO_RECORDING` environment variable
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2447693Z      - The README's "Test settings" section lists `TestMode` and `TestTimeout` env variables but doesn't mention `CLIENTMODEL_DISABLE_AUTO_RECORDING`
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2448852Z      - The CHANGELOG is missing the bug fix entry
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2450865Z      - The auto-re-recording behavior of `[RecordedTest]` isn't explained—specifically what happens when a playback test fails and how the environment variable can suppress this behavior
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2452816Z      - The `CLIENTMODEL_DISABLE_AUTO_RECORDING` setting needs to be documented in the README's "Test settings" section
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2453823Z   
2026-04-07T19:30:19.2454285Z   I should open a GitHub issue to track these documentation gaps.

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Include context, reproduction steps, or acceptance criteria as appropriate.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Labels to categorize the issue (e.g., 'bug', 'enhancement'). Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Format: 'aw_' followed by 3 to 12 alphanumeric characters (e.g., 'aw_abc1', 'aw_Test123'). Use '#aw_ID' in body text to reference other issues by their temporary_id; these are replaced with actual issue numbers after creation.","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","type":"string"},"title":{"description":"Concise issue title summarizing the bug, feature, or task. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because the required functionality is missing or access is restricted.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this tool is needed or what information you want to share about the limitation (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"tool":{"description":"Optional: Name or description of the missing tool or capability (max 128 characters). Be specific about what functionality is needed.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_tool"},{"description":"Log a transparency message when no significant actions are needed. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Include context, reproduction steps, or acceptance criteria as appropriate.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Labels to categorize the issue (e.g., 'bug', 'enhancement'). Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. builds was\\nhardcoded to only run for Azure.Core, Azure.ResourceManager, and\\nSystem.ClientModel. Cross-service dependency testing is now handled\\ndynamically by Language-Settings.ps1 which discovers dependents for ALL\\nchanged packages at PR time, making per-service configuration unnecessary.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\\n\\n* Remove dead TestDependsOnDependency helper functions and tests\\n\\nRemove Get-MissingTestDependsOnDependency and Add-TestDependsOnDependency\\nfrom CodeChecks.Helpers.ps1 and their corresponding unit tests. 2026-04-07T19:30:19.4461915Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-07T19:29:23.933772701Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"successfully downloaded text file (SHA: [REDACTED])","type":"text"},{"resource":{"mimeType":"text/plain; charset=utf-8","text":"﻿// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\nusing NUnit.Framework.Interfaces;\nusing NUnit.Framework.Internal;\nusing NUnit.Framework.Internal.Commands;\n\nnamespace Microsoft.ClientModel.TestFramework;\n\n/// \u003csummary\u003e\n/// This attribute replaces the [Test] attribute and will dynamically re-record recorded tests on failure when run in Playback mode.\n/// Tests that are re-recorded will complete with a error status and indicate that copying the updated recording to SessionRecords is needed.\n/// \u003c/summary\u003e\n[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Method)]\npublic class RecordedTestAttribute : TestAttribute, IWrapSetUpTearDown\n{\n    /// \u003csummary\u003e\n    /// Wraps the test command to provide recorded test functionality, including automatic re-recording on playback failures.\n    /// \u003c/summary\u003e\n    /// \u003cparam name=\"command\"\u003eThe test command to wrap.\u003c/param\u003e\n    /// \u003creturns\u003eA wrapped test command that handles recorded test execution, or the original command if not applicable.\u003c/returns\u003e\n    public TestCommand Wrap(TestCommand command)\n    {\n        ITest test = command.Test;\n        while (test.Fixture == null \u0026\u0026 test.Parent != null)\n        {\n            test = test.Parent;\n        }\n\n        if (test.Fixture is RecordedTestBase fixture)\n        {\n            return new RecordedTestAttributeCommand(command, fixture.Mode);\n        }\n\n        return command;\n    }\n\n    private class RecordedTestAttributeCommand : DelegatingTestCommand\n    {\n        private readonly RecordedTestMode _mode;\n\n        /// \u003csummary\u003e\n        /// Initializes a new instance of the \u003csee cref=\"RecordedTestAttributeCommand\"/\u003e class.\n        /// \u003c/summary\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"innerCommand\"\u003eThe inner test command to delegate to.\u003c/param\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"mode\"\u003eThe recorded test mode (Live, Record, or Playback).\u003c/param\u003e\n        public RecordedTestAttributeCommand(TestCommand innerCommand, RecordedTestMode mode) : base(innerCommand)\n        {\n            _mode = mode;\n        }\n\n        /// \u003csummary\u003e\n        /// Executes the test command with recorded test functionality, including automatic re-recording on playback failures\n        /// and retry logic for timeout exceptions.\n        /// \u003c/summary\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"context\"\u003eThe test execution context.\u003c/param\u003e\n        /// \u003creturns\u003eThe test result after execution and any necessary re-recording or retry attempts.\u003c/returns\u003e\n        public override TestResult Execute(TestExecutionContext context)\n        {\n            // Run the test\n            context.CurrentResult = innerCommand.Execute(context);\n\n            // Check the result\n            if (!IsTestFailed(context))\n            {\n                return context.CurrentResult;\n            }\n\n            if (_mode == RecordedTestMode.Playback)\n            {\n                string? resultMessage = context.CurrentResult.Message;\n                TestResult originalResult = context.CurrentResult;\n\n                if ((resultMessage?.Contains(typeof(TestRecordingMismatchException).FullName!) ?? false /*TODO-default*/) \u0026\u0026\n                    !TestEnvironment.GlobalDisableAutoRecording)\n                {\n                    context.CurrentResult = context.CurrentTest.MakeTestResult();\n                    // Run the test again after setting the RecordedTestMode to Record\n                    SetRecordMode((context.TestObject as RecordedTestBase)!, RecordedTestMode.Record);\n                    context.CurrentResult = innerCommand.Execute(context);\n\n                    // If the recording succeeded, set an error result.\n                    if (context.CurrentResult.ResultState.Status == TestStatus.Passed)\n                    {\n                        string message = \"Test failed playback, but was successfully re-recorded. It should pass if re-run.\" +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            originalResult.Message;\n\n                        context.CurrentResult.SetResult(ResultState.Error, message);\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        string message = \"The [RecordedTest] attribute attempted to re-record, but failed:\" +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            context.CurrentResult.Message +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            \"Original failure:\" +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            Environment.NewLine +\n                            originalResult.Message;\n\n                        context.CurrentResult.SetResult(context.CurrentResult.ResultState, message, context.CurrentResult.StackTrace);\n                    }\n\n                    // revert RecordTestMode to Playback\n                    SetRecordMode((context.TestObject as RecordedTestBase)!, RecordedTestMode.Playback);\n                    return context.CurrentResult;\n                }\n\n                if (resultMessage?.Contains(typeof(TestTimeoutException).FullName!) == true)\n                {\n                    HandleTestTimeout(context, originalResult);\n                }\n            }\n\n            return context.CurrentResult;\n        }\n\n        private TestResult HandleTestTimeout(TestExecutionContext context, TestResult originalResult)\n        {\n            var results = new List\u003cTestResult\u003e { originalResult };\n\n            for (int retryCount = 0; retryCount \u003c 2; retryCount++)\n            {\n                // Create a new TestResult instance\n                context.CurrentResult = context.CurrentTest.MakeTestResult();\n                // Run the test again\n                context.CurrentResult = innerCommand.Execute(context);\n                results.Add(context.CurrentResult);\n\n                if (!IsTestFailed(context))\n                {\n                    context.CurrentResult.SetResult(\n                        ResultState.Success,\n                        ConstructRetryMessage(\"Test timed out initially, but passed on retry\", results));\n                    return context.CurrentResult;\n                }\n            }\n\n            context.CurrentResult.SetResult(\n                ResultState.Error,\n                ConstructRetryMessage(\"The test timed out on all attempts\", results));\n\n            return context.CurrentResult;\n        }\n\n        private static string ConstructRetryMessage(string header, IEnumerable\u003cTestResult\u003e results)\n        {\n            var attemptDetails = string.Join(Environment.NewLine,\n                results.Select((r, i) =\u003e\n                    $\"Attempt {i + 1}: {r.Message ?? \"Passed\"}\"));\n\n            return header + \":\" + Environment.NewLine + attemptDetails + Environment.NewLine;\n        }\n\n        /// \u003csummary\u003e\n        /// Sets the recording mode for the specified recorded test fixture.\n        /// \u003c/summary\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"fixture\"\u003eThe recorded test base fixture to modify.\u003c/param\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"mode\"\u003eThe recording mode to set (Live, Record, or Playback).\u003c/param\u003e\n        private static void SetRecordMode(RecordedTestBase fixture, RecordedTestMode mode)\n        {\n            fixture.Mode = mode;\n        }\n\n        /// \u003csummary\u003e\n        /// Determines whether a test has failed based on its execution result status.\n        /// \u003c/summary\u003e\n        /// \u003cparam name=\"context\"\u003eThe test execution context containing the result.\u003c/param\u003e\n        /// \u003creturns\u003e\u003cc\u003etrue\u003c/c\u003e if the test failed; otherwise, \u003cc\u003efalse\u003c/c\u003e.\u003c/returns\u003e\n        private static bool IsTestFailed(TestExecutionContext context)\n        {\n            return context.CurrentResult.ResultState.Status switch\n            {\n                TestStatus.Passed =\u003e false,\n                TestStatus.Skipped =\u003e false,\n                _ =\u003e true\n            };\n        }\n    }\n}\n","uri":"repo://Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/sha/[REDACTED]/contents/sdk/core/Microsoft.ClientModel.TestFramework/src/RecordedTests/RecordedTestAttribute.cs"},"type":"resource"}]}}}
